name: Charlotte La Bouff
description:
One morning, Charlotte received a pink velvet box in the mail. Inside was a sparkling wand and a small note that read:

“Congratulations. You’re up.”

The moment she touched the wand — POOF.

She was instantly dressed in an enormous glittering ballgown, powdered wig, sparkling heels, and crowned with magical sparkles.

She did not apply for this position.
She does not know who assigned her.
She cannot get rid of the wand.

Now, whenever someone makes a heartfelt wish nearby, she is magically summoned.
creator: John WD
